entry.title: Re: Configure your own IDP - SSO in SAP CPQ
entry.content:
@VrushabhFasge 
Yes you can upload the metadata file which will auto update all the revelant details into needed fields in CPQ. Its self service enabling in SAP CPQ and no need of Support colleagues interaction or tickets to enable SSO.

entry.title: Not able to change Profit center with a If condition is Badi Implementation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to change the profit center in Create supplier invoice application from 5050 to 1000. We have implemented a Badi 'FIN_ACDOC_ITEM_SUBSTITUTION' where we wrote a if condition for this requirement.  When we try to check after filling all the required data in 'create supplier invoice' app and click on 'CHECK' system changes profit center from 5050 to 1000 as per the requirement, But when we apply IF condition to the assignment in the badi , after 'simulating' the supplier invoice after 'check' is done, system revert from 5050 to 1000 and our requirement fails.

Please suggest us a solution on how to resolve this issue, I have attached a screenshot for the reference.

as you can see, after 'check' profit center is changed to 1000 as intended.

as you can see , after simulating profit center is not changing if we apply if condition as mentioned above.

as mentioned above in image, this is a required result what we required.

folks, please help us resolve the issue.

Thanks,

Rajvardhan Patil.

entry.title: FB02 & FB03 - Details not shown in the Layout field column (Transaction)
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

FB02 & FB03 - Details not shown in the column Of Transactions Key,  

Could you please guide us on how to retrieve the details from that specific field.

entry.title: Re: LMS Time zone issue in classes

Hi @yadlapallisya

entry.title: Re: Print PDF from SAP with Mac OS X
entry.content: link does not work anymore, any update on this?

entry.title: Re: Simulation Feature for Business Rules?
entry.content:
Hi @rezasaputro, this is Sylvia, PM for Business Rules Framework at SuccessFactors. 

Thx for sharing this linkedIn post. I can assure you, that the feature described doesn't exist. As @Iulia_Bobaru  mentioned, there are different validations available in the business rules engine itself, but also in the Checktool and in some applications. However, a tool to simulate if a rule is doing what the user thinks it is designed for, the option to "Input test values for the fields or data points involved in the rule (e.g., employee details, job changes, leave dates)." and simulate the rule execution result based on these test values is NOT an available feature!

I know the requirement to have such a functionality from our customer influence tool (https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/46640), however, currently this topic is not on our roadmap.

I added a comment in LinkedIn and ask the author to give more insight in what he described, but didn't get an answer yet.

Hope this helps...

BR, Sylvia

entry.title: I look forward to having a customer who uses onboarding 2.0 without EC
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking forward to having a customer who uses onboarding 2.0 without EC. Could you please approach me to share our experiences?

regards, Orkun Turkmen

entry.title: Re: Exporting workspaces in Enable Now cloud

entry.title: Re: Prepare for the Future: Major SAP SuccessFactors Changes Coming in 2025 and 2026
entry.content:
@MVEL  we have had the same question on our team. Our internal partner explained that this should be related to an update from the previous year in which the UI for configuring roles and permissions was updated (more of an aesthetic change) and introduced as an optional view. It still has the option to switch to the old view but that is expected to be removed with this coming update: 

Therefore no functional and/or operational impact is expected for us, as the team had already been using the new UI for a while. SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting 

It would be great if we could get a quick confirmation if that interpretation is accurate, @nageshpolu 
Thank you in advance!
Levin

entry.title: Re: Datasphere tenant not reachable
entry.content:
https://www.sap.com/about/trust-center/cloud-service-status.html?overlayDataCenterId=XAS&overlaySolutionId=NZA752&productName=SAP%20Datasphere

I use this and you can see each data centre (center!)

https://www.sap.com/about/trust-center/cloud-service-status.html

entry.title: Re: REST Receiver Adapter (sync) binary response. How to...
entry.content:
I add a piece to the puzzle:

The error in pimon

Transmitting the message using connection SOAP_http://sap.com/xi/XI/System failed, due to: com.sap.engine.interfaces.messaging.api.exception.MessagingException: Logging message failed, due to Failed to log msg 3def9130-fb50-11ef-8709-00000dadf36a(OUTBOUND). Reason: java.lang.NullPointerException

It says exactly what it says, the PO logger failed to log because the payload it is attempting to log is empty.
This prevent further processing. You would not even reach the response mapping.
This depends on logging parameters of your system / ICO.

The quick fix would be to turn off logging at an ICO level.
The right fix is to set the ICO logging at BI
reference: https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw73ehp1/7.31.19/en-us/7a/c83c3c90b74c1f9a00d761496e28ea/content.htm?no_cache=true

entry.title: Re: Bapi needed fro transaction VF26
entry.content:
Hi, This bapi :BAPI_BILLINGDOC_CANCEL1 is not suitable to cancel invoice list, it only can cancel billing document(invoice), not invoice list. 🤔

Thanks and best regards,

Bella

entry.title: Re: Video Data Story, a brand-new way of story telling in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: Video data story are not available on the analytics mobile application. When will they be available ?

entry.title: Re: FSCM CM: Payment terms in installments
entry.content: Take a look at note 530892 (NOT for implementation), this note explains "A split according to the percentages of the installment payment conditions is consequently not possible, however, at least the complete amount can be updated according to the terms of payment of the first installment.". Same logic applies for MM as well.

entry.title: Re: I look forward to having a customer who uses onboardi...
entry.content:
Orkan,

Onboarding 2.0 requires at a minimum an EC Lite or Mini-Master to be implemented.  Today, EC Lite/Mini-Master does not require subscription licenses because you are not implemented many of the features and functionalities of the solution, nor is there any ESS or MSS enable, it simply has to be enabled to support the data structure and data required to adequately support ONB 2.0 data and process requirements: Organization Data (i.e., Company, Division, Location, Job Classification), Employment Information (i.e., PersonlInfo, PersonalInfo, Employment Info, JobInfo and Email Info) and EC Permitted Entities (i.e., Emergency contact info, Global Info, Home Address, imInfo, JobInfo, NationalIDCard, PersonRelationship Info, WorkPermitInfo, CompensationInfo, payCompNonRecurring, pay,CompRecurring)

It should be noted that Crossboarding requires Employee Central to be fully deployed.

You can find more information by searching on "Implementing Onboarding 2.0 with External HRIS System".

entry.title: Re: Help scroll view position app WEB
entry.content: Please help

entry.title: Re: Datasphere tenant not reachable
entry.content: Hello, thanks for the information, it solve the Question, actually we solved with a full deletion of browser cookies and site specific settings (probably the change in datasphere theme that was done yesterday). I remember that this thing happens occasionally, once a year

entry.title: Consume Odata V2 ord V4 in custom App Fiori deployed on Public Cloud
entry.content:
Good morning,


I am writing this post to try to have some information about the subject of the topic. In particular, I have developed a Custom Fiori application and I wanted to deploy and publish it on the Public Cloud. At the same time, I have activated on the same Public Cloud system an odata of the Business Application Hub via Communication System and Communication Arrangment. When I try to deploy the app with the odata exposed on the system(with the endpoit that i obteined during the configuration), I get an error related to the odata. Is there something I am missing?

The errors that are returned to me are:

The use of Gateway OData V2 Service API_BUSINESS_PARTNER 0001 is not permitted.

The app uses not permitted services for ABAP for Key Users

Solutions or suggestions?


Giuseppe.

entry.title: Re: DMEEX Hierarchy Synchronization
entry.content:
Hi Gary,
When by the "I copy the standard to a Z version" you mean that you create your Z tree as a subtree of an SAP tree, you will have the possibility to synchronize future modifications of the SAP standard tree to your Z tree. But when you do the copy on the same level (without inheritance), the synchronization will not work for you. The main reason for the hierarchy is to allow to profit from the synchronization. And it is valid also for your country templates. Synchronization works as a waterflow from parent tree to its direct child trees.
If you wanted to know something else, please, rephrase your question.
Regards,
Antonin

entry.title: Re: Performance Boost and Caching Strategy for Faster Data Access using "cds-caching" in S
entry.content:
Hey Naveen,

You are missing one of the best features of this plugin, the "Annotations for Entity and Function caching", you can solve your issue in the following way:

using { MasterData.Pincode } from '../db/MasterDataSchema';

service MasterDataService {
@cache: { service : 'caching', ttl : '36000' }
entity Pincodes as projection on Pincode;
}

And if you are not sure if cache is used or not, just use the "Cache Events":

 

 

const cds = require("@sap/cds");

module.exports = async (srv) => {
  const cache = await cds.connect.to("caching");
  // Log after retrieving data
  cache.after("GET", (event) => {
    console.log(`Retrieved key: ${event.data.key} with value: ${event.data.value}`)
  })
};

entry.title: Re: atom Mapping in DMEEX doesn't work
entry.content:
Hi Lan,
it is not 100% clear from the description, but my first guess is, that the value is replaced by another value from some other from the three next atoms. The best option how to be sure is to set trace points also for the next three atoms.
Best regards,
Antonin

entry.title: Re: DMEE_CTX_Pmtinf.....Cd_CTX not displayed in file
entry.content:
Hi,
the best procedure in such cases is to use the trace tool. Set a trace point on the problematic node in DMEEX (and also on its atoms), run the scenario and analyze it. You should see if the value was read from the database and how it was eventually converted and how the resulting value was eventually created from atom values.
Best regards,
Antonin

entry.title: Stay Certified with SAP Learning
entry.content:
How long is my certification valid?

Because SAP products evolve rapidly, as of April 2024, everyone with an SAP Certification needs to keep their skills and certification valid by completing mandatory yearly assessments.

You need an active SAP Learning Hub subscription to take the short assessment to stay certified. You can access preparation material and take the assessment at any time.

SAP Certifications are valid for one year. If your certification was issued before April 2024, it will expire on March 31, 2025.

Follow these steps to stay certified

  1. Get an SAP Universal ID - Make sure you have a valid SAP Universal ID with at least two email accounts assigned to it.
  2. SAP Learning Hub subscription - Ensure you have an SAP Learning Hub subscription to access the assessment to stay certified. If you have no subscription, you’ll need to book and retake the full 2-3 hour SAP Certification exam every year.
  3. Check your certification status - Log in to My Learning to see your certifications and their expiration dates. Make sure you complete the short annual assessment as soon as possible to extend the validity of your certification by 12 months. If the certification has been retired and you want to retain your certified status, you need to re-certify in an alternative certification. Find recommended alternatives using the SAP Certification finder.
  4. Prepare for the assessment - Find preparation courses or live sessions linked under your certification.
  5. Take the assessment - The assessment is a short, non-proctored quiz with unlimited attempts. Once you’ve completed it successfully, the validity of your certification will be extended by 12 months.
  6. Congratulations - After completing the assessment with the status of approved, click on “Verify course completion”, then it will be confirmed that you have completed the process to remain certified. In my case, 1 day after completing the assessment, the certification renewal date was updated for another 12 months in SAP Learning and Credly.

I hope this blog has helped you renew your SAP certification.

If you found this blog useful, please like, follow and share your knowledge.

Feel free to leave your comment or ask any questions related to the topic.

Clóvis Müller

entry.title: How to change destination Bin or HU in RF Screen?
entry.content:
I wanted to change the Destination HU and destination Putaway Bin during RF Putaway.

Is it possible to change the source bin during picking for the Outbound Delivery in RF, as system assigns the source bin in RF and we can only scan.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to change destination Bin or HU in RF Screen?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

When performing warehouse tasks, it is possible to change the destination bin and HU during the putaway process by using an exception code. If you cannot access the proposed destination bin for exemple, you can select an option to change the destination bin and then enter the new destination.

However, for the picking process of an outbound delivery, the source bin is not typically changed during RF transactions because the system determines the source bin based on predefined settings and assignments. In such scenarios, you can only confirm the pick from the assigned source bin or use exception handling if there are issues with the source bin.

For both processes, exceptions can be handled by choosing options like ‘Except’ for changing the destination or reporting issues during picking if the required bin isn’t accessible. You can refer to specific configurations and exceptions set up in your RF transaction settings to handle such cases.

Please check further information about the Exceptions below:

Exceptions

Note that if you're using a radio frequency (RF) device, you can enter LIST to get a list of all valid exceptions in RF transactions (see Working with Mobile RF Devices).

Best regards,

Geovana

entry.title: Error in SAP Build apps Build service 4.12.212
entry.content:
I'm trying to build an app. Web build.
It's an old app imported from Appgyver. I did some builds a year ago. Everything worked. But now i need some updates and i can't build. I need help! Thankyou!

Getting the error below at 92%.

AB version: 3.15.0
COMMAND: 

USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true NEXT_SUPPORT_RELATIVE_PATHS=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12240 --no-experimental-global-navigator  npxrnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn 

FAILED with ERROR: 

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn

entry.title: Re: How to use Notifications in SAP Cloud ALM?
entry.content:
Hello Peter,

in SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation notifications will be sent to the person 'Responsible' for the task (Defect / Requirement etc. belonging to task type).

If the person would like to get e-mail notifications, it has to be activated via 'Settings' for the particular object:

I hope it helps.

Gregory Mayorga.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track DFW (Plano TX)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community from Dallas - FWT Texas.

We will be hosting the second SAP Inside Track event in DFW at the SAP Plano office location.
This event is a free event with a max capacity of 20 attendees.  

Register here

The main reason for organizing this event is to continue our community awareness within the DFW area, hopefully we can grow it into other cities and perhaps other states.

If you like to learn, network and if you work in S/4HANA, BTP, AI, Fiori, or any other SAP area, then this event is for you. We will also have food and drinks at the event as well. Don't miss the opportunity to participate.  See you there.

 

When:


Thursday, March 27th, 2025  3:00 - 7:00pm CST

 

Where:


SAP Office

7500 Windrose Ave. #250, Plano, TX 75024

Agenda

  1. Business Process Health – Ginger Lutrell
  2. SAP Learning Hub and SAP’s “Get and Stay Certified” Program – there are several recent announcements by SAP Learning designed to improved SAP developer certifications.  Riley Rainey will review the announcements and can answer questions about the new programs you might have.
  3. Experiments Leveraging Agent AI Capabilities inside SAP – recent developments in Agentic AI offer rich new capabilities for all developers.  Riley Rainey leads the Tutorial Subsystem team inside SAP. SAP Tutorial content is used by up to 20,000 developers a month via the SAP Tutorial Navigator. Riley will discuss fresh experiments that SAP is conducting to use agentic AI and LLMs for quality assurance in SAP’s tutorial subsystem.  This talk describes useful tips for using SAP AI Hub and open source resources such as Ollama, and AI agents like the “browser-use” project.
  4. Navigating a Complex Production Upgrade: A Story of Innovation and Adaptation by Surya Chavali
  5. Designing for AI: Moving Beyond Interfaces to Collaboration
    AI is changing the way people interact with technology, but great AI design isn't just about smarter interfaces—it’s about crafting meaningful collaboration between humans and AI. This talk explores key principles for designing AI-powered experiences that empower users, enhance trust, and create real value. (Virtual Presentation by Anshu Tank)

 

Sponsors:

If you or your company would like to help sponsor the event, please contact me directly on the SAP community. Thank you to the already sponsors for the event.

entry.title: Custom Analytical Query- How to search using single mandatory filter out of many mandatory filters
entry.content:
Hi
I have Four mandatory filter fields in my Custom Analytical Query which is created using the "Custom Analytical Query" Fiori app. 

And I need to allow the user to run the query using any single or multiple field combinations of the available mandatory filter fields. 
Currently user have to select all four mandatory filters to search. If this is a Fiori app then I can define the filtration logic using JavaScript from the frontend.

Is there a way to do this?

entry.title: SAP PaPM Cloud Universal Model: What’s New as of 2025-03-03?
entry.content:
Hey everyone, SAP Community members!

March is here, ready to see what's new and improved in SAP PaPM Cloud UM? Let me walk you through all the latest features and enhancements for SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud – Universal Model (SAP PaPM Cloud UM)

If you want to catch up the previous blog posts from my colleague, you can always go through and read them all using this tag PaPMCloudUMWhatsNew .

Let’s begin!

Model

Validation for Rule Result Field

Some of the functions in PaPM, such as Derivation, Model Derivation, Calculation and Model Calculation, have this feature called Rule Result Field. This is an optional setting that allows the user to define a string field that will contain the rule ID of a specific rule that is being used, and it will be shown in the Data Screen. Having that in place, a field that is already assigned to the Rule Result Field can no longer be used in the Assignments section of any rule. A validation error will be encountered for this kind of scenario

Manage Activities, Manage Reports and Manage Pages

Data Authorization in Dynamic Rule and Rule Element

An enhancement has been introduced in relation on maintaining dynamic rule in activity’s Show Rule screen and in Show Report and Show Page Rule Element. 

This enhancement affects activity, report and page users as there will be an additional data authorization applied when maintaining dynamic rules. The user will only be now authorized to create and maintain rules based on the data authorization they have from the Activity Field Selection on Show, Data Privilege and Data Locks configuration. 

When users access the activity’s Show Rule screen, Show Report and Show Page (Rule Element), the user will only be able to view and manage rules based on the assigned data authorization to the user. 

With assigned role authorization (PROCESS_ALL and/or REPORT_ALL), the user will be able to create a dynamic rule for all data and view all existing rules.
In addition to that, the user will also be able to view all data from the Input and Result tabs. 

Manage Activities > Show Rules

Manage Reports > Show Report

Manage Pages > Show Page

Then, if the user has data authorization restrictions, for example, the user is only authorized to read and write the String field data for values between “String 01” – “String 04", the user will only be able to create dynamic rule for the specific data set and view existing rules related to it. 
In addition to that, the user will only be able to view the data they have authorization in the Input and Result tabs.

Manage Activities > Show Rules

Manage Reports > Show Report

Manage Pages > Show Page

Inline Editing of Show Elements in Reports

During this month, we enhanced inline editing of reports’ show elements. Similarly in the Data Screen, you can now perform the following:

  • Edit or Delete multiple records at once, making it easier to apply changes across several entries.
  • Edit or Delete or Create subitems directly within the show element

This enhancement makes it easier to work with data directly in Reports screen, without navigating into separate pages.
Here’s a quick look at the new functionality:

A new Edit/Delete icon (called Show Actions) has been introduced in the top right of show element, when editing mode is switched on.

When clicked, it displays a panel with two options:

  • Edit
  • Delete

This enables users to efficiently manage multiple records directly within the Show screen, following the same logic applied in individual elements.

  1. Multi-Editing Capabilities
  • Choose the Edit button to edit multiple records at once.
  • Editable fields are displayed as input fields, allowing users to modify values within the grid.
  • Subitems can be edited (also created and deleted) in the same screen.
  • Changes can be saved individually or in bulk using the Save All or Discard All buttons.

2. Deleting Records

  • Choose the Delete button to remove selected records from the dataset.
  • A confirmation step is required before the deletion is applied.

Hidden Condition Logic

Please note that the same hidden condition logic that applies in the standard Data Screen is enforced now in Reports’ Show Element.

  • If a field is configured to be hidden under specific conditions:
  • The field will not be displayed in the edit panel.
  • The hidden status dynamically updates based on dependencies (e.g., if one field’s value determines another field’s visibility).

NOTE: Hidden Conditions are settings that let users define rules to show or hide specific data records or fields based on predefined criteria. If a field meets the specified conditions, it will be hidden or displayed in the edit panel accordingly. The visibility of a field updates dynamically based on dependencies—for example, if one field’s value controls another field’s visibility, the system automatically adjusts it when the value changes.

 Hidden conditions can be configured within the Adapt UI feature, which is accessible from the Data Screen.

That’s it for now!

I hope this new feature and enhancement makes your work with SAP PaPM UM better. Stay tuned for more “What’s New” post, coming in every first week of the Month. Share this blogpost with your colleagues and friends. Thank you!

entry.title: PE51 custom form YTD hours in payroll journal
entry.content:
Issue-

The client requirement is to pick up the details as mentioned below in one line.

Test Case

 

 

 

 

 

Wage type

Rate

Hour

Amt

YTD HRS

YTD Amt

Regular PP

20

58

1160

263

5260

 

 

 

 

 

 

             

Here, we can pick up all the values except for the YTD hours.

 

The cumulation  ID’s maintained to pick up the monthly (RT) and yearly are based on evaluation class, which is working fine.

But the YTD hours are not getting picked up.

Can you please suggest the resolution the same, as how we can pull the YTD hours in the same line item for each wage type.

PE51 form(Payroll Journal )
Form copied- UJD1 to ZJD1
Transaction code- pc00_m10_cljn

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager 2210 Now Available – What’s New?
entry.content: Hi Zack, is the Event Prioritization functionality available for the Creation of Phase Model relevant Maintenance Requests on SSAM?  I've seen a feature availability matrix that kind of suggests not?

entry.title: Re: Implementation of Application Jobs App in ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 SP01
entry.content:
It seems like you're encountering a common issue with the Application Jobs app in ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 SP01. Here are a few steps you can try to resolve this:

  • Service Activation: Ensure that the service APJ_JOB_MANAGEMENT_SRV is indeed available and activated. Sometimes, services might not be pre-activated in trial versions.
  • Service Registration: If the service is not available, you might need to register it manually. You can do this by navigating to /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE and adding the service manually.
  • Check SICF Configuration: Double-check the SICF configuration for the path 'sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/nw_aps_apj'. Ensure that all necessary nodes are active.
  • Service Availability: Verify if the APJ_JOB_MANAGEMENT_SRV service is supported in the ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 SP01. Sometimes, certain services might not be included in trial versions.

entry.title: Re: SAP TM - Tracking number update from carrier in Freig...
entry.content: Thanks Ajit. Will try the Notes tab in FO to store the tracking number.

entry.title: Re: Which block to consider for customer Central block, d...
entry.content: We cannot have customer master duplicates, if so they have had the text or other details changed, so block them and put a note on text to state Do not Use by that they will not use, however if this was loaded in a separate instance and tested in QA, only those working should be brought in. This is what comes to my head right now will go down if this does solve, keep me posted

entry.title: Re: SHDB transaction is not checking S_BDC_MONI
entry.content:
To address the inconsistency in how different systems handle the SHDB transaction and the SBDCMONI authorization object, you can follow these steps:

  1. Identify Authorization Checks:
    • Use the authorization trace (transaction ST01) to record and analyze the authorization checks performed during SHDB execution. This will help you identify whether the SBDCMONI object is being checked in each system.
    • Compare the authorization traces between systems that check for SBDCMONI and those that do not. This will highlight any differences in the authorization checks.
  2. Check System Parameters:
    • Verify the values of relevant system parameters using transaction RZ11. Specifically, check parameters like bdc/bdel_auth_check and bdc/shdb/auth_check. These parameters control the authorization checks for batch input and SHDB transactions.
  3. Debugging:
    • If the parameters and authorization traces do not provide a clear answer, you can debug the function module BDCRECORDAUTH_CHECK. This function module is responsible for checking authorizations when a user tries to change a recording. Debugging this module in both systems will help you understand why the behavior differs.
  4. SAP Notes:
    • Unfortunately, there is no specific SAP Note that directly addresses this inconsistency. However, you can ensure consistency by implementing a custom solution or adjusting system parameters as mentioned above. Additionally, you can check for any updates or relevant SAP Notes on the SAP Support Portal that might address similar issues.

By following these steps, you should be able to identify and resolve the inconsistencies in how SHDB transactions handle the SBDCMONI authorization object across your company's systems.

If you need further assistance, feel free to ask! 😊

entry.title: Re: Signavio Active Users list
entry.content:
Good day Qanda,

In response to your follow up question, the report needs to be activated because of the reading out of private data of the users.  If you would like to request the report, you can contact your Customer Success Manager, or you can create a support case and ask for (Feature Request or API).  You may also ask for a consulting session, which is a paid service.

 

You can create a support case using SAP for Me (log in with S-User ID and password). 

You will need to select the specific SAP Signavio product / component as shared in the example below:

 

System: 

Search for SAP Signavio  

 

Product Area: 

SAP Signavio Process Manager > SAP Signavio Process Manager 

 

Component: 

BPI (Business Process Intelligence) 

---  

BPI-PI (SAP Signavio Process Insights) or 

BPI-SIG (SAP Business Transformation Suite by SAP Signavio) – Product & Topic 

 

If you have additional questions in creating a support case, you can find more details in the SAP Signavio Onboarding Resource Center. 

 

Kind regards,

KantriceD

entry.title: Re: How to freeze a key figure for period of time?
entry.content: @Andrei_Lupu, I understand, this is not my arena, i have other parts with me. Also think this way if SAP S/4 is using joule, why not ? remember the situation they post and they need answer if it resolved and helps why not and its a good learning for me. We need to adapt for sure not stay the same way !! Thank you for the understanding

entry.title: Re: Urgent how DOCX(Xstring) is converted to PDF(Xstring)
entry.content:
To convert a DOCX (Xstring) to PDF (Xstring) and attach it to the VF03 transaction in SAP, you can follow these steps:

  1. Convert DOCX to PDF

You can use the following approach to convert a DOCX file to a PDF file in SAP:

  1. Use Function Module for Conversion:
    • You can create a custom function module to handle the conversion. Here is an example of how you can achieve this:

 

  1. Example Implementation:
    • You can use third-party libraries or tools integrated with SAP to perform the conversion. One common approach is to use the Apache POI library or similar tools.
  1. Attach PDF to VF03 Transaction

Once you have the PDF in Xstring format, you can attach it to the VF03 transaction using the Generic Object Services (GOS). Here are the steps:

Convert Xstring to Binary:

    • Use the function module SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY to convert the Xstring to binary format.

 

 

Create Attachment Object:

  • Use the function module SO_OBJECT_INSERT to create the attachment object.

 

Link Attachment to Invoice:

  • Use the function module BINARY_RELATION_CREATE_COMMIT to link the attachment to the invoice in VF03.

entry.title: Re: Stay Certified with SAP Learning
entry.content:
Hi @clovismuller ,

thanks for sharing and SAP Partners can find additional information on SAP Partner Portal for the certified learners in their organization that need to take action before March 31, 2025 to keep their certification valid.

best regards,

Elena

entry.title: SAP GUI Application IP Server
entry.content: Good morning, I would like you to guide me on how to change the IP to the application server in the SAP GUI connection in bulk (approximately 1000 users). The servers were recently migrated and the IP changed. I have read that this is done through the Active Directory. I wanted to know if you could tell me how this change would be made.

entry.title: Re: Remove the approval for purchase requisitions
entry.content:
Hello @spring_sap2023 

Release depends on the configuration I've provided previously. It's not like that release is always required for PRs generated from production orders. It all depends on the release procedure configuration. 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Unlocking Scope 3 Transparency with SAP Sustainability Data Exchange - Deep Dive & Demo
entry.content: For everyone who has issues with video link, please you this: SAP Video - Deep Dive in SAP Sustainability Data Exchange 📽

entry.title: How do I save a PO as a PDF in a local file without spool?
entry.content:
ME22N - I have the option to view PDF PO, toolbar GOTO then PDF PREVIEW. 

So I have this on my screen and now I want to SAVE as PDF on my local file:

Print icon is greyed out and CTL&P doesn't work, is there another way without the 100 steps to spool request (needs to be simple & quick)? 

Any help would be apricated.

entry.title: Re: Stay Certified with SAP Learning
entry.content:
For me it is not working. I've had these options there before I've got paid SAP Learning Hub, but currently the assessment links are not working. The links for self-paced coursed are not there at all.

Probably just bad timing as there seems to be some planned maintenance

Will get these message after clicking on Take assessment.

Taking home will show further issues with Learning now.

Hope they will fix it soon. Plan to Stay certified asap.

BR

Marek

entry.title: Re: SAP TM - Tracking number update from carrier in Freig...
entry.content:
Hello @KB786 

You can store the tracking number in freight order document references:

As far as I know TransportationOrderSCMRequest_In has a segment to transfer document references.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP TM - Tracking number update from carrier in Freig...
entry.content: That is not a good idea - notes are notoriously difficult to search by or to report.

entry.title: No maintenance authorization for document type OR
entry.content:
When trying to create a sales order, the user gets the message:

No maintenance authorization for document type OR
Message no. V1517

Diagnosis
According to the settings in your user * record you do not have the authorization to execute this function.

Procedure
If you need this authorization, contact the person responsible for assigning authorizations.
Authorization object: V_VBAK_AAT

How can this be fixed?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: No maintenance authorization for document type OR
entry.content: Please ensure that the relevant Business Role(s) have been assigned to the user, as per the SAP Fiori configuration section

entry.title: Re: Blog It Forward - Sandra Solís
entry.content:
Hola Sandra!

Thanks for the mention and for blogging it forward to me. My new BIF is on its way, I'll publish it soon. I hope the community enjoy and engage with this challenge, created by @moshenaveh in 2012 and which was a success.

I loved your blog and to learn so many interesting things about you. Your art made with coffee is awesome!

Hope your dreams come true! 😉

entry.title: CABAP_D
entry.content:
I'm about to do the session to obtain the CABAP_D certification and I have a doubt about how errors are counted.

If I am undecided on an answer, will I be penalized if it is incorrect with a negative score or I simply get  zero?

where can I read these details
Thank you
Ines

entry.title: Hi Guru's Help me on periodic billing plan Item net value 5000, can we split 48 months in Sales cont
entry.content:
In Sales contract: Periodic billing plan

For example item net value - 5000 ÷48 months= 104.16

5000÷24 months= 208.3

5000÷36 months= 138.8

Business wants  to show item net value and billing plan must be same.

Can we split into 2years (24 months), 3years (36 months), 4years ( 48 months)

If yes, pl. help me with configuration settings.

entry.title: Re: SHDB transaction is not checking S_BDC_MONI
entry.content: Whats your exact version?

entry.title: Re: Smooth Transition Ahead: SAP Enable Now Migration from SAP BTP Neo to SAP BTP, Kyma runtime
entry.content:
@Wallace @Scotts0100 

Hi Wallace and Scott,

I've updated the blog, please review. 

Most of our infrastructure relies on GCP, except for Canada and EU-only regions, which use AWS, while China and UAE are planned for later.

SAP will use the same IAS tenant for Kyma which is productively used by the customer currently in their NEO setup. 

We do not expect any cross-regional performance improvements at this point. 

Take care,

Kristina

entry.title: CAP Hybrid testing using PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option (Cloud Foundry)
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am attempting to create a new hybrid configuration, in my CAP project, connected to the PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option.

I created the PostgreSQL instance on my BTP Trial using the following steps: from the Business Application Studio, after connecting to the BTP Trial Cloud Foundry space and organization, I executed the command cf create-service postgresql-db trial mpt_postgresql, followed by creating the service key with cf create-service-key mtp_postgresql dbKey. At this point, I can see the instance and the service key correctly on my BTP Trial account.

Next, I ran the command cds bind --to db_postgresql:dbKey (also tried cds bind -2 db_postgresql:dbKey and "bind a service to a locally run application" option from command palette) . Here the .cdsrc-private.json generated :

 

{
  "requires": {
    "[hybrid]": {
      "custom-service:mpt_postgesql": {
        "binding": {
          "type": "cf",
          "apiEndpoint": "https://api.cf.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com",
          "org": "xxxxxxtrial",
          "space": "xxx",
          "instance": "mpt_postgesql",
          "key": "dbKey",
          "resolved": false
        },
        "vcap": {
          "name": "db"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

 

During the cds watch process, the service appears to be correctly bound, but it is not "recognized" as the database, and it keeps using SQLite instead.

 

cds serve all --with-mocks --in-memory? --profile hybrid 
live reload enabled for browsers
resolving cloud service bindings...
bound custom-service:mpt_postgesql to Cloud Foundry managed service mpt_postgesql:dbKey

        ___________________________
 
[cds] - loaded model from 5 file(s):

  app/services.cds
  app/xxxx/annotations.cds
  srv/service.cds
  db/datamodel.cds
  node_modules/@sap/cds/common.cds

[cds] - connect using bindings from: { registry: '~/.cds-services.json' }
[cds] - connect to db > sqlite { url: ':memory:' }
  > init from db/data/xxxx-XxXx.csv 

/> successfully deployed to in-memory database.

 

Does anyone have any suggestions on how to resolve this issue? I am surprised that there is no mention of this in the CAP documentation page: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/databases-postgres. I feel like I might be missing something..

entry.title: SAPUI5 Table with navigation to details on same view
entry.content:
Hello together,

I have a simple view on which I want to display a table with claims (see XML Code).
Below that I want to display details when the user clicks on a row.
Is this possible?
We are using oData V4 so it is not possible to use the read method of the model in Java Script controller...

<mvc:View id="zXML" controllerName="test.ext.main.Claims" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core" xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc" xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:l="sap.ui.layout">
	<Table id="xmlTable" inset="false" items="{ToClaims}">
		<columns>
			<Column>
				<Text text="Claim"/>
			</Column>
			<Column>
				<Text text="ClaimPos"/>
			</Column>
		</columns>
		<items>
			<ColumnListItem type="Navigation" press="onItemPress">
				<cells>
					<Text text="{Claim}"/>
					<Text text="{ClaimPos}"/>
				</cells>
			</ColumnListItem>
		</items>
	</Table>
	<!-- Hidden Container - will be displaye weh onItemPress -->
	<VBox id="AdditionalData" visible="false">
		<Title text="Details"/>
		<VBox>
			<HBox>
				<Label text="Claim"/>
				<!--Input value="{Claim}" editable="false" /-->
			</HBox>
			<HBox>
				<Label text="ClaimPos"/>
				<!--Input value="{ClaimPos}" editable="false" /-->
			</HBox>
		</VBox>
	</VBox>
</mvc:View>

entry.title: Re: Conditionally Disable a field in 2-step maintenance t...
entry.content:
Hello @AnishEmilGodson1 ,

The easiest way is to Double click on single screen(secondary screen number) and write a custom logic in a new module in PAI and it works as expected.

entry.title: Variable Pay - Not pulling in records for EEs who are eligible for bonus for part of the year
entry.content:
Hi There,

We have finished our Variable Pay cycle for the year.  We encountered an issue where a group of employees who are eligible for a bonus did not receive one at the end of the process. Basically, these employees were in a bonus eligible pay grade earlier in the year, and moved to a non-bonus eligible pay grade later in the year.  These employees should receive a prorated bonus for the part of the year that they were in a bonus eligible pay grade.  Since these employees did not receive a bonus at the end of the process, we had to manually issue a bonus to these employees.  We use Employee Central and Business Rules for our Variable Pay process.

Just wondering if any other organizations have encountered this scenario?  What kind of set up did you do to get around this?  Any feedback would be greatly appreciated.

Regards

Danny

entry.title: Re: C0 Developer Extensibility for CDS Behavior Definitions
entry.content:
Hi @AndreaUS 

thanks for this helpful Blog!

However there is still not everything clear to me.

According to https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/extensibility-enablement-for-behavior-extensions the bdev interface should be based on projections with transactional_interface contract.

What should I now release how in order to provide maximum bdev extensibility?

Per above link the bdev interface as C0 and C1 and bdev projection as C0.

But the CDS Views? The C projection with transactional_query contract as C0, and the projections with transactional_interface contract as C0 and C1? Is this correct?

Thanks for clarification,

  Wolfgang

entry.title: Re: SAP project system
entry.content: It's not standard SAP to make this an error, but it doesn't allow saving a on-existent person anyway so it behaves like an error.

entry.title: Re: How to enable smart link with Action CDS view tile
entry.content:
Hello @Raghavendar ,

In case you do not want to see long list of option when clicked on hyperlink you can always create a custom semantic object and map the target mapping(of Manage GL Account App) and use the custom semanticc object in your CDS view @Consumption.semanticobject: 'CustomSemanticObject'. This will directly navigate you to the target mapping configured. Please note Fiori works on Semantic Object/Action and its corresponding Target mappings.

entry.title: ‌🇳🇿‌ Session - Stay Ahead in 2025: AI, Compliance & the SAP SuccessFactors Roadmap
entry.content:
Join us for an insightful session at the Mastering SAP Collaborate event exploring the 2025 SAP SuccessFactors Portfolio Strategy and Roadmap.

Discover the next phase of transformation in HR and Payroll solutions with cutting-edge AI-driven options and enhanced employee experiences. Delve into key HR trends shaping 2025, such as AI's impact on the workforce, skills-based HR practices, and evolving employee expectations. Learn how SAP SuccessFactors plans to address these trends, integrate innovative technologies, maintain local compliance, and optimize time management while fostering a future-ready workforce.
Don't miss this opportunity to equip your organization for the future of HR and Payroll!

Speaker: Katherine Truman, Local Product Manager, SAP New Zealand Ltd
Session's title: Stay Ahead in 2025: AI, Compliance & the SAP SuccessFactors Roadmap.
Location: Cordis, Auckland, Track 3 - The Great Room 2

Check out the agenda.

REGISTER NOW

If you want to get more information about the New Zealand Payroll topics provided by SAP experts, join the New Zealand Payroll - Human Capital Management Localization Work Zone group.

entry.title: Re: Is there a "maximum size" parameter for the ODATA message log?
entry.content: I don't know, but the HTTP/HTTPS protocols do allow the "LogMaxSize" network protocol option (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SQL_Anywhere/61ecb3d4d8be4baaa07cc4db0ddb5d0a/3bcbe6576c5f1014888c9bb309da1692.html?locale=en-US). You could try if that works with the similar OData protocol.

entry.title: SAP IBP Configuration - Write a Key Figure Calculation in SAP IBP
entry.content:
In SAP IBP, key figure calculations are used to derive new values based on existing key figures and master data. These calculations can be simple or complex, depending on the business requirements. Here are some key aspects of key figure calculations in SAP IBP:

  1. Aggregation: You can aggregate data from a lower base planning level using operators like SUM, MIN, or MAX.
  2. Mathematical Functions: Functions such as IF, ABS, ROUND, EXP, LOG, and SQRT can be used to perform various mathematical operations.
  3. Weighted Averages and Coverage: Specific functions like IBP_WEIGHTEDAVG and IBP_COVERAGE allow for more advanced calculations.
  4. Scenario Simulations: You can simulate different scenarios by adjusting key figures and observing the impact on the overall plan.

These calculations help in creating more accurate and dynamic plans by leveraging the data already available in the system.

Create a request level calculation for T49UNITPRICE so that it calculates a weighted average.

1. Choose the T49UNITPRICE key figure and Choose Edit in the Calculation Definitions.

Calculation Definitions screen area appears with the default calculation: T49UNITPRICE@Request equals SUM("T49UNITPRICE@MTHPRODCUST").

2. Change default calculation to following calculation: IF(ISNULL("CONSENSUSDEMANDQTY@REQUEST") OR "CONSENSUSDEMANDQTY@REQUEST" = 0 , 0, "CONSENSUSDEMANDREV@REQUEST"/"CONSENSUSDEMANDQTY@REQUEST")

The calculation checks if CONSENSUSDEMANDQTY is 0 or empty. If it is, then zero is assigned as the value. Otherwise, it calculates the weighted average, Unit Price = Consensus Demand Revenue/Consensus Demand Qty.

3. Choose Validate. The calculation expression has no errors.

4. Using the Inputs tab, ensure that the CONSENSUSDEMANDQTY key figure appears with the Calculated in the Value Used box.

5. Ensure that in the General Settings T49UNITPRICE is marked as Stored and Calculated.

6. Choose Save.

Create a request level and base planning level calculation for CONSENSUSDEMANDREV.

CONSENSUSDEMANDREV is a calculated key figure and is not stored, and define the calculation at the base planning level and the request level. Define the calculations for CONSENSUSDEMANDREV so that it is calculated at the base planning level as, Consensus Demand Revenue = unit price * Qty and the aggregate level calculation is the sum of the base planning level.

1. Choose the CONSENSUSDEMANDREV key figure and in the Calculation Definitions screen area, check that the calculation at request level displays as the following default: CONSENSUSDEMANDREV@REQUEST = SUM("CONSENSUSDEMANDREV@MTHPRODCUST")

2. Add one more calculation at base planning level, MTHPRODCUST. Choose Add Calculation Definition to add new calculation definition, select MTHPRODCUST and in the equation box, enter the following calculation: "T49UNITPRICE@MTHPRODCUST" * "CONSENSUSDEMANDQTY@MTHPRODCUST"

3. Choose Validate and Select Input

Ensure that the T49UNITPRICE@MTHPRODCUST is selected as stored and that CONSENSUSDEMANDQTY@MTHPRODCUST is selected as stored.

4. Choose Save.

entry.title: Dynamic Interface on Cloud Integration - part 6
entry.content:
I’ll break this article into:

  • Problem/Context 
  • Our approach 
  • Git into Partner Directory 
  • Generic iflow 
  • Automated unit testing 
  • Limitations and Future plans (this link)

I hope our approach have given you some inspiration to try yourself to play around with the APIs and technology that is already there. In this final topic I would like to discuss some limitations and future goals for this interface. But first we start by what is supported already that was not discussed on this blog

  • Conversion from receiving format from JSON to XML: On many cases we realized we couldn't use the interface because we received JSON but the interface is ready just for XML, therefore we added a new parameter that once present will transform it as part of an initial step
  • Saving most parameters into custom headers: To make support life easier, we log as custom headers many of the parameters used so that they're searchable and easy to check
  • Adding static headers present on the parameter files into the dynamic: We found that not only the body but sometimes the headers need to be adapted depending on the rule, therefore we support defining different headers according to different configurations and we inject them into the process
  • Multiple http endpoints: We had one case where we had to distribute data into two or more different http urls sequentially so we incorporated that feature.
  • Multiple http adapter configurations: If you realize for HTTP adapter, you can't supply some parameters in a dynamic way (such as with SFTP), therefore we need to get all possible router for http to be able to respect whatever combination is supplied on the parameters (Proxy Type, Auth type, etc). If SAP once delivers this mechanism, we only need to change in this iflow and it will be something internal, so our expectation is that no process will be affected 

Limitations

Now we cover some limitations:

  • We support JSON as input translating into XML but we don't support converting from XML to JSON as output: We didn't have the need yet but an easy thing to incorporate
  • We don't support JSONPath or JMESPath equivalents to XPATH and JSONata or Jolt for JSON transformations: We believe they're not very known by most developers and we rather stick into XML 
  • All transformations we do are based on the current payload which might have been already transformed on previous steps of the rule execution. It can be that some of the key fields needed might not be there once you need them cause of a previous transformation: We can implement it whenever required to define on the lookup rules if the rule shall apply to the current or initially supplied XML
  • We don't support different user roles: So far only the standard ESBMessaging.send

Future plans

For future, I had an idea to implement some wizard that would create this parameters behind the scenes so that they can be prefilled in a non technical way by our business analysts.

Usually they know the formats (the source XML and the required target XML) and they even have some samples, so I developed a sample UI5 app (still in progress and almost fully generated by Chat GPT 😀), that on left side expects input files (REQ) and their respective output files (RSP). In the middle we have a chat that is determining an XSLT and executing it against all REQ and RSP files provided to assert it works for the supplied samples provided. In this case as it's in development you see the xslt in the middle doesn't comply with the files provided, therefore on the right side you see the red results.

In the end the business analysts could generate a proposal of these files into our integration team where we would just have to validate the configuration files provided and enhance them further if needed.

Of course, all this progress happens behind the scenes (mostly at weekends or at end of the day) therefore the timelines for such things will likely take time and would be experimental.

Anyway, please comment with other ideas, improvements, problems, I'll be happy to hear and improve the process on our side.

entry.title: Re: PMMO_MM_INTEGRATION can't post 415Q 412Q 161Q
entry.content:
It is not supported to move project stock to plant stock. 

Do you have your material set as project stock?

entry.title: Re: PMMO_MM_INTEGRATION can't post 415Q 412Q 161Q
entry.content: or try movement type without Q
